cond_when.tooltip: Condition (when) — policy applies when the inner expression is true

cond_unless.tooltip: Condition (unless) — policy blocks when the inner expression is true

scope_is.tooltip: Entity type check (is Type); fill both right-hand fields to add an in clause

scope_slot.tooltip: Template slot (filled when the policy is instantiated)

action_scope_eq.tooltip: Match a specific action (e.g. Action::"Swap" or Token::Action::"Erc20Permit"). Type the namespace exactly as registered in the schema.

expr_lit_entity.tooltip: Entity literal (used as a value; e.g. User::"alice")

expr_has.tooltip: Field presence check (e.g. context has amount)

expr_binary.tooltip: Binary operation on two expressions (comparison / logic / arithmetic / set)

expr_set.tooltip: Set literal — stack element blocks (•) inside

expr_record.tooltip: Record literal — stack key:value blocks inside

expr_like.tooltip: String pattern match (`*` is a wildcard)

expr_is.tooltip: Entity type check (the in slot is optional)

expr_if.tooltip: Conditional expression (Cedar `if c then a else b`)

expr_ext.tooltip: Extension function call (e.g. decimal, ip, ...). Stack argument blocks inside

expr_raw.tooltip: Cedar expression not mapped to a block — original EST preserved (read-only)

expr_hole.tooltip: Parameter slot — the author exposes a blank, the adopter fills the value in a form

expr_field.label: field %1
expr_field.tooltip: Field dropdown — pick any defined path from one block. If the domain blocks (colored categories on the left) read better, use those instead.

ir.topLevelNotPolicy: Top level has a non-policy (policy_hat) block "{{type}}"
ir.isTypeEmpty: Type of the is block is empty
ir.isInHalfFilled: in clause of the is block: fill both TYPE / ID or leave both empty
ir.actionInUnexpected: Unexpected block "{{type}}" in the action_scope_in list
ir.condUnexpected: Unexpected block "{{type}}" in the condition slot
ir.hasFieldEmpty: Field name of has is empty
ir.setUnexpected: Unexpected block "{{type}}" in the set element slot
ir.recordUnexpected: Unexpected block "{{type}}" in the record pair slot
ir.extArgUnexpected: Unexpected block "{{type}}" in the ext argument slot
ir.rawCorrupt: EST JSON of the raw block is corrupted
ir.fieldPathUnknown: Field dropdown value "{{path}}" is not in the glossary
ir.fieldPathNoChain: Cannot convert field path "{{path}}" to an attr chain
ir.presetPathNoChain: Cannot convert preset field "{{path}}" to an attr chain
ir.exprUnknownBlock: Unknown block "{{type}}" in an expression slot

param.nameInvalid: Name must be letters/digits/_ only (first character a letter)
param.nameTaken: The name "{{name}}" is already in use
param.promptType: Type hint (e.g. address / amount / token, optional):
param.confirmOptional:
Make this parameter optional?
(Falls back to the default when left unfilled)
param.unsupportedBlock: Cannot parameterize — block "{{type}}" supports only lit/litEntity/set

manifest.needSingleAction: An enrichment policy needs a single `action == …` head (action in […] / unspecified not allowed).
manifest.noBinding: No enrichment binding fills 'context.custom.{{field}}'. Only registered fields can be used.
manifest.notApplicable: '{{field}}' cannot be used with the '{{tag}}' action (supported: {{supported}}).

workspace.hint: Blockly v9 · drag blocks from the left categories onto the policy tree
workspace.simulateTitle: Evaluate the policy against a sample action and red-box the blocks that caused the denial
workspace.forbidOnly: Only forbid policies can be diagnosed
workspace.noViolation: Not denied for this sample (no violated condition)
workspace.violations: Marked {{count}} violated conditions with red boxes
workspace.importSummary: Import Cedar code — paste text and convert to blocks
workspace.importOverwriteWarning: Warning: the current canvas will be overwritten

sidebar.title: Parameters
sidebar.rowTitle: Click: find the block on the canvas

fill.success: All parameters applied — check the resulting Cedar in the preview above
fill.setPlaceholder: Values separated by commas or newlines
